クラス SimulationClock

java.lang.Object
simulation.runtime.SimulationClock
public class SimulationClock extends Object
Owns simulation time progression and timer-event execution.

This extracts the event queue and current-time bookkeeping from CombatSimulator so the simulator can delegate timeline management.

  • フィールドの概要

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • SimulationClock

      public SimulationClock(CombatSimulator sim)
      Creates a clock bound to the given simulator.
      パラメータ:
      sim - active simulator passed through to scheduled events

  • メソッドの詳細

    • getCurrentTime

      public double getCurrentTime()
      Returns the current simulation time.
      戻り値:
      current time in seconds

    • getRotationTime

      public double getRotationTime()
      Returns the end time of the latest completed action or timeline advance.
      戻り値:
      rotation time in seconds

    • setRotationTime

      public void setRotationTime(double rotationTime)
      Explicitly records the latest rotation time marker.
      パラメータ:
      rotationTime - time in seconds

    • registerEvent

      public void registerEvent(TimerEvent event)
      Registers a timer event in chronological order.
      パラメータ:
      event - event to add

    • advanceTime

      public void advanceTime(double duration)
      Advances time and executes all due timer events in order.
      パラメータ:
      duration - duration to advance in seconds
